chunks.text: g* ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-819 of 2016., Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For orders on office objection at flag A For katcha peshi. 29.09.2016. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ameer Ahmed Narejo, State Counsel. Counsel for the petitioner submits that Lal Mohammad patemal nephew of the Petitioner was killed and Altaf Hussain matemal nephew of the Petitioner sustained injuries on 01.7.2016 in the evening at about 7:00 pm at the hands of respondents No.5 to 7, who shown the incident as encounter and such FIR was lodged bearing crime No.16/2016 under section 324,353,427,34 PPC and Crime No.l712016, under section 23 Sindh Arms ordinance both at Police Station Ghulam Shah. Learned counsel further submits that the said encounter was fake and infact the rylice arrested the aforementioned nephews of the Petitioner and subsequenfkilled Lal Mohammad and caused injuries to Altaf Hussain therefore, this Petition may be disposed of directing the DIGP, Larkana to depute any God fearing police officer to make impartial inquiry into the matter and submit his report before this Court. Leamed State Counsel recorded his no objection. Under the circumstances, we direct DIGP, Larkana, to depute any honest and God fearing Police officer not beiow the rank of DSP, to conduct impartial inquiry into the matter and submit his report before this Court, within a period of one month hereof, through Additional Registrar of this Court. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE {,,^r,t I JUDGE I S Ashfaq.1n
